pc.label: Gwlm
pc.name: Warforged Juggernaut Barbarian 5/Fighter 3
pc.languages:
You can speak, read, and write Common.
Source: Wayfinder's Guide to Eberron, Chapter 3

action.name: Longsword +2
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 + 5 slashing damage.

action.name: Armblade Moonblade
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 + 5 slashing damage.

action.name: Armblade Warhammer
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 + 5 bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Bolas
action.text: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 1d4 + 3 bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Iron Fist
action.text: Attack: +6 to hit. Hit: 1d4 + 3 bludgeoning damage.
